# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: vpc-network
    type: googleapis.com/compute.v1.GlobalNetwork
    properties:
      name: my-vpc-network

  - name: subnet
    type: googleapis.com/compute.v1.Subnetwork
    properties:
      parent: ${resources['vpc-network'].selfLink}
      name: my-subnet
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.0.0/24

  - name: cloudSqlInstance
    type: googleapis.com/sqladmin.v1beta4.Instance
    properties:
      databaseVersion: POSTGRES_12
      instanceName: my-cloudsql-instance
      region: us-central1
      rootPassword: myRootPassword
      tier: db-n1-standard-1

  - name: cloudSqlInstanceConnection
    type: googleapis.com/sqladmin.v1beta4.DatabaseInstanceConnection
    properties:
      parent: ${resources['cloudSqlInstance'].selfLink}
      instanceReference:
        projectId: $PROJECT_ID
      privateIpAddress: ${resources['subnet'].networkIP}

  - name: cloudStorageBucket
    type: storage.v1.Bucket
    properties:
      name: my-bucket
      storageClass: STANDARD

  - name: computeInstance
    type: googleapis.com/compute.v1.Instance
    properties:
      name: my-instance
      machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
      zone: us-central1-a
      disks:
        - autoDetect: true
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: ${resources['subnet'].selfLink}
          accessConfigs:
            - name: external-nat
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT

  - name: loadBalancer
    type: googleapis.com/compute.v1.TargetHttpProxy
    properties:
      name: my-loadbalancer
      urlMap: ${resources['urlMap'].selfLink}

  - name: urlMap
    type: googleapis.com/compute.v1.UrlMap
    properties:
      name: my-urlmap
      defaultUrlRedirect:
        redirectResponseCode: MOVED_PERMANENTLY_HTTP_301
      hostRules:
        - hosts:
          - "*"
          pathMatchType: EXACT
          paths: ["/"]
          httpRedirect:
            redirectResponseCode: FOUND_HTTP_302
            useNamedPort: true
            portName: my-managedPort
      priority: 1000
      pathMatcher: ${resources['pathMatcher'].selfLink}

  - name: pathMatcher
    type: googleapis.com/compute.v1.PathMatcher
    properties:
      name: my-pathmatcher
      defaultService: ${resources['backendService'].selfLink}
      pathRules:
        - paths: ["/*"]
          service: ${resources['backendService'].selfLink}

  - name: backendService
    type: googleapis.com/compute.v1.BackendService
    properties:
      name: my-backendservice
      backend:
        group: ${resources['instanceGroup'].selfLink}
      portName: my-managedPort
      connectionDraining:
        drainTimeoutSec: 60

  - name: instanceGroup
    type: googleapis.com/compute.v1.InstanceGroupManager
    properties:
      name: my-instancegroup
      zone: us-central1-a
      version: V1
      instanceTemplate: ${resources['instanceTemplate'].selfLink}
      namedPorts:
        - name: my-managedPort
          port: 80
